string 2: The Digital World is filled with mysteries.
Indeed.

I may not be of much help, but I bet you will
solve many of them along your journey.
Yeah, and you're one of them.

I am nothing in the vast scope of the Digital World.
You should tackle a greater enigma.
It doesn't bother me.

It does not bother me, either.
All I care about is remaining a force for good.
Not really.

The conflict between good and evil is simple enough.
If that is your focus, then that's fine by me.
You had better not get too close to me.
But I want to get close to you.

Do not underestimate my electric shocks. 
Get too close during combat, and you would not escape unscathed.
Why?

Because you may get shocked in the aftermath
of my attacks... though that is not certain.
I have no intention of going near you.

Good. Now I can fight without fear of
you getting caught in the crossfire.
I'm already too close.

Then you must step further away.
I do not want you to get shocked.

When they speak of a golden swordsman,
they speak of me.
I'd love to have a golden sword!

That alone will not ensure victory, and only I can wield it.
Do what works best for you.
That's some gaudy taste you've got there.

This armor is made not of gold, but of golden Chrondigizoit.
Calling it "gaudy" would be simply inaccurate.
That's cool as heck!

I imagine I'll soon have an opportunity to show off
my sword skills. I do hope I am wrong, though.
You shine so bright, I gotta wear shades!

That is who I am. Get a good, long look
at my glorious, golden sheen!
You... should not get too close to me.
But I want to get close to you.

I suspect even you might have an idea of
what would come from such an action...
I wouldn't, even if you asked me to.

A wise decision. That is a natural reaction
for anyone who discerns my true nature.
What would happen if I did?

Let us just say that our relationship would
face a critical crossroads.
But we're friends.

Despite that, do not forget that I am a berserker at heart.
Heed my warning.
I know myself better than anyone.
So, who are you?

I will not answer that question.
Do not test me, human.
How did you turn black?

I found myself like this before I knew it.
I would appreciate anything you can elucidate.
Even the part of you that rampages out of control?

I am not sure what you are talking about,
but do not pry too much.
I'd like to learn more about you.
That is not necessary, but I will be sure to remember you.
